reviews.title: Sent back twice because the blood pressure measurement was inaccurate
reviews.text: I had some confidence in buying this at first.  It connected to app nicely and did well with sleep measurement when I tried that.  I also liked the face choices.  However, having a reasonably accurate blood pressure measurement as long as it is included as a feature was very important for me.  It always read about the same measurement of 140/86, but that was not accurate when compared to a cuff style.  It also read the same for my wife who is always different.  I returned one, got an easy replacement and had the same issue.  Returned for refund this time.  I did not check if waterproof, but that was also an important feature.

reviews.title: does what it's supposed to
reviews.text:
*edit: I've found a con and it bugged me enough to update my review. If your phone is on "Do not disturb" and you leave your phone on at night for emergency calls, the watch still vibrates with every text, regardless of whether they're on your emergency list. This is annoying when you're a light sleeper and you get a text for go cart racing or Dairy Queen at 4 am. I'm assuming it would still go off with a call as well.

I have a Garmin Vivofit that for some reason the notification vibrations will work for a couple months, then stop working for a while, then randomly start working again. I was sick of this, and went looking for something not too expensive and found this. I'm still getting used to it, but it vibrates when I get a call or text, so I'm happy so far. The band is very flexible and comfortable, which is nice, since my Vivofit band was a little stiff.

reviews.title: Great watch for the price.
reviews.text: After buying the earlier brands of Fitbit which I loved. I bought myself a Luxe on sale for $100 last December 2021. It didn’t record anything accurately and just didn’t function the way it should. CS was if no help. I switched to Amazfit!  This is a great watch, the battery has lasted over a week. It accurately tells time, my heart rate, steps and I love this watch. It’s great and is so light on my wrist!!

reviews.title: Terrible smart watch, inaccurate and waste of time/money
reviews.text: After 5 months of use I’m done with this. It seems to be getting less accurate every workout. It can’t even get step counts correct. The accuracy of the heart beat monitoring varies too. The sleep monitor is often wrong about awake times so I don’t believe the other sleep data either. The only thing I can believe with this watch is the time of day.

reviews.title: Good budget watch if you don't need always-on display
reviews.text: Overall, this is a very reasonably priced watch with a lot of functionality. However, the fact that it doesn't have the always-on screen option was a deal breaker for me and I had to replace it with one of their other models.

reviews.title: Did not like this nearly as much as my original amazfit bip watch
reviews.text:
I bought an Amazfit Bip watch a year or more ago and have really been enjoying it The app tracks all my cycling trips and the sleep monitoring is useful. Iam really a big fan of the long battery life of the older model.

This watch has a 9 day battery life which is not nearly as long as the 30 days of the original watch.

This watch meausres blood oxygen levels but taking the measurement requires holding your wrist it the right position and takes much longer that the finger tip device Ihave.

I did not exhaustively evaluate the new app that came with this phone but it did not look nearly as good as the original app.

How to use it?
1.Search the "M2" app on the App Store or scan the "M2" QR code on the instruction booklet or in the watch, for downloading.
2.Refer the seller's video: how to connect the watch to the phone in action and a demonstration of important features.
★Five-star after-sales:
We are committed to making every family member have a good smart watch experience, If you are not satisfied with the Smart Watch you purchased, feel free to contact us, the professional team is happy to serve you!
Package Included:
1pcs x smart watch dial

Specification:
Color: black, gold, grey
Smartwatch size: 25.5*4*1cm/10.04*1.57*0.39inches.
features: ✅【1.81" LARGE SCREEN & 100+ WATCH FACES】Released in 2022, smart watch for android iOS phones has a large screen （1.81") with 320*385 resolution, which makes the fitness watch stylish and easy to read even under the sun. And the screen lightness is adjustable. And there are four different interface styles （most recommend the gear-shaped one,friendly to fat fingers) and 100+ watch dials without extra charges in the app available for you to choose

✅【AN INDISPENSABLE HEALTH TRACKER】Fitness watch tracks your heart rate in real time (very accurate after multiple trials), records daily steps, calories burned, distance traveled and most importantly your sleep data. It also reminds you to stand up and have a walk after your sit for too long and when it's time to get some water. All this can help you lead a healthier life

✅【BLUETOOTH CONNECTIVITY AND COMPATIBILITY】When the sport watch is connected to the M2 app via Bluetooth, you can control the music player, check weather forecast, control your camera remotely and most importantly receive and make calls. As for compatibility, this smartwatch can work seamlessly with iOS 9.0, Android 5.0 and other higher Bluetooth smartphones. To make it simple to you, if your phone was bought in and after 2016. It can work with our watch in most cases

✅【LONG-LASTING BATTERY AND WATERPROOF】With a large battery(250mAh), the smart watch which is also designed to be durable and long-lasting, can be used for a week or more without charging and it only takes less than 2 hours to get it fully charged with that magnetic fast charger（included）. As for it's waterproof level, it's IP65, which means you don't need to take it off while washing your hands or showering

✅【MULTI-FUNCTIONAL】Fitness Tracker watch is equipped with many other practical functions like alarm, stopwatch, breath training, little games and time format changing. And it can display in 22 different languages. One more user-friendly and thoughful design is its notification settings: silent, vibrate, normal

reviews.title: Impressive watch with features
reviews.text: Watch has many features for fitness and heath I bought 2. Some of the screens are well thought out. Accuracy is a key benefit of this watch. Needed to use newer version of app and works with my android phone. Current version is metric and new version is to have imperial values. Vendor was responsive and resolved questions ASAP. Plan to buy new version with upgrades when available

reviews.title: lastima el software del celular
reviews.text:
Este reloj tiene varias cosas interesantes, pero lastimosamente el software del celular que lo controla tiene muchas fallas, por ejemplo cuando uno agrega una lista de contactos favoritos al reloj, esporadicamente desaparece y hay que volver a crearla. Tambien es frecuente que se desconecta el programa y el reloj, por lo que se dejan de recibir notificaciones en el reloj.

Tambien hay problemas con la personalizacion del skin, donde uno selecciona una foto de fondo, la descarga al reloj y aveces despues de unos minutos u horas desaparece y toca volver a hacer el proceso.

Tambien la aplicacion del celular esta mal diseñada, algunos botones no se ven bien y es dificil encontrar como seguir cuando se quiere configurar el reloj.

Lo bueno del reloj:
- permite recibir y hacer llamadas desde el reloj ya que trae microfono y un pequeño parlante, pero hay que aclarar que necesita al celular cerca y conectado por bluetooth.
- Reporta bien la mayoria de notificaciones que recive el celular, como llegada de SMS, emails, mensajes de whatsapp, aunque no muestra emojins.

-La bateria carga en 90minutos completamente y puede durar 3 dias sin tener que recargar.

En resumen hasta que el fabricante no mejore los problemas de software no es una buena compra este reloj.

title: Adjustable Elastic Wrist Band/Ankle Band for Compatible with Fitbit Charge 5 Fitness Tracker, Stretchy Band for Men and Women (Black)
description: Soft, stretchy, comfortable and lightweight, very useful replacement accessories pack for your fitbit charge 5 fitness tracker, offering two different way to wear your watch (short strap for wrist, long strap for ankle), you will love to use all day, idea for anyone looking for a replacement, back-up or additional accessories.
features: Compatible with fitbit charge 5 fitness tracker ONLY
Handmade, elasitc woven fabrics, good elasticity and doesn't emit any odor
Easy to remove and install. Lightweight and super cute
Package include 2 straps, short strap for wrist, Long strap for ankle
One size but adjustable, short strap fits 5.7~9.5 inches wrist, long strap fits 7.5~13.5 inches ankle

reviews.title: Don't Bother. I have tried 4 of these from them for my Charge 5. Also comes loose from the Fitbit
reviews.text: Headline says it all. My first order, I was hoping it was just a rando, but exchanged, and every single one has the same problem.  Just sloppy construction -- enough out of spec that it might or might not work. I love the band. It's a crying shame it doesn't stay connected to the fitbit. Can't imagine how there could be even a single 5-star -- maybe the first batches were fabricated correctly.  Unfortunately there's nothing as nice or comfortable that I've been able to find for charge-5, so I may end up getting yet a 5th and 6th trial and frankensteining them with parts that do work to get something that works and something I like. I'll let you know

reviews.title: Waste of money
reviews.text: The band keeps stretching out as you wear it. Within a month I couldn’t tighten it anymore.

reviews.title: Yasss!!
reviews.text: No more irritation from original band! I love it and wish I got it sooner

title: B-Great Ankle Band for Men and Women Compatible with Fitbit Flex 2/One/Zip/Charge 2 3/Alta HR or Garmin Vivofit/2/3/4/JR Fitness Tracker
description: Comfortable to wear activity tracker around your ankle - keep tracks of ALL your steps while exercising (like on a treadmill, or pushing a grocery cart, or ridding a bike, etc). The band attach a mesh pouch to hold your tracker and that closed with a touch fastener inside, so you don't have to worry about your tracker slipping out any more.Very soft, light-weight, even you don't notice it's there. Easy to use with snaps closure and adjust size. 100% man made, very durable. At present, our ankle band compatible with the following models: Fitbit Flex, Fitbit Flex 2Fitbit OneFitbit ZipFitbit Charge 2 or Charge 3 (Not Charge or Charge HR) Fitbit Alta, Fitbit Alta HR Fitbit Inspire, Fitbit Inspire HRGarmin Vivofit/ 2/ 3/ 4/ JRMisfit Shine, Misfit Shine 2Sony SmartbandOther bullet style activity tracker..... How to detect your heart rate with this ankle band?To track heart rate, just simply flip over your fitness tracker and put it into the mesh pouch, make sure the heart rate monitor face up to your ankle skin, it will detect your heart rate through the small mesh holes and works fine.
features: Allow you wear activity tracker around your ankle and get more accurate steps
Compatible with Fitbit, Garmin, Misfit, Sony or other bullet style activity tracker
Soft and comfortable fit, does not irritates skins, easy to use with snap closure
Keep your tracker secure in the mesh pouch that closed with a touch fastener
Package inlcude only one piece ankle band, not include tracker or other parts

reviews.title: Very accurate on counting steps
reviews.text: I'm happy I found this! In my opinion, it is way more accurate than wearing my Fitbit on my wrist. I've gone from thinking I was a snail and not moving most days to a walking whiz! Just keep in mind if you are out in public with pants that don't cover it, folks may look at you. It looks a little like an electronic monitoring bracelet. Which is fun to me. Let them wonder what I've been up to.....

reviews.title: Heart rate not detectable most of the time
reviews.text: It's nice for working out. But it does not track heart rate with a darn. Lights facing in though the mesh tight on the skin and nadda. A big disappointment. Directly on the skin, adjusted all around. Charge 3

reviews.title: Didn't count steps
reviews.text: I used this for a few weeks because I didn't feel my band was counting steps when I was shopping or carrying something.  I was very surprised to see that after a full day out-and-about I had under 300 steps on the counter.  That's roughly what I would normally have when I got up to get my morning coffee.  I tried re-adjusting and tried the other leg, but got the same result.  I'm back to keeping my tracker on my wrist.  Disappointed.

reviews.title: Comfortable and Lightweight
reviews.text: I love this! It is exactly what I need to help me keep moving and to accurately register steps as I work to increase my activity! The band is light and very comfortable. I hardly even notice that I have it on. The band does have some stretch to it which helps in making it easy to put on.

reviews.title: Works great!
reviews.text: This band has helped me continue to get my steps when I am watching and carrying grandchildren, pushing a stroller or grocery cart, doing a lot of carrying around the house...I love it!  It is comfortable and secure!  With four snaps I can't imagine how you could lose it!

reviews.title: Excellent value for price
reviews.text: I would describe this watch as something for health purposes rather that physical training. I really like the heart rate, blood pressure, and sleep tracker. Pedometer is also pretty accurate. I wish there were more color schemes. Overall it’s a great dupe for an iWatch or Samsung watch for 1/10th of a price.

title: Apple Watch SE (GPS, 40mm) - Silver Aluminum Case with Abyss Blue Sport Band (Renewed)
description: Stay safe, active, and healthy with the Apple Watch SE. The SE sports the same bright LTPO OLED Retina display as the Series 6, giving you a bright screen you can view at a glance, even in bright sunlight. On it, you can view all of your fitness metrics, health stats, and mobile notifications. When it comes to health, the SE's optical heart rate monitor can give you indicators of a possible medical condition with notifications for high or low heart rates, as well as irregular rhythms. Even healthy habits are supported, such as hand-washing detection, which displays a 20-second animated countdown as you scrub. Fitness is a large part of staying healthy, and the Apple Watch SE has a variety of ways to assist you in reaching your goals. Activity Rings displays three rings that correspond to movement, exercise, and standing. Stay mobile throughout the day to hit new personal bests as you close the rings.You can also choose from a variety of workouts, such as running, swimming, yoga, cycling, and more; with the watch recording and tracking their specific metrics. Whether inside or outdoors, the SE can guide you via GPS and even provide continuous elevation updates on screen. As you move, choose from a variety of music, podcasts, and audiobooks to entertain and motivate you. For added fun, share your activity rings with friends and challenge them to 7-day activity competitions. Throughout the day, the Apple Watch SE keeps you connected with the world around you. When paired with your iPhone, you can make calls and send texts directly from your wrist, navigate your surroundings with Maps, buy items with Apple Pay, and use your voice to interact with Siri. Made to last in almost any kind of weather, the Apple Watch SE is water-resistant up to 164'. Use its 32GB of built-in storage for apps, watch faces, music, and more.
features: LEAVE YOUR PHONE IN YOUR POCKET: Apple Watch SE GPS Model lets you call, text, and get directions from your wrist, while leaving your phone in your pocket. It offers multiple connectivity options, including: Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, and NFC to suit your needs, whatever they might be.

LARGE RETINA OLED DISPLAY: The SE sports a bright LTPO OLED Retina display, giving you a bright screen you can view at a glance, even in bright sunlight. A variety of watch faces are available for the SE watch, including faces that provide essential information for specific activities.

LOADED WITH FEATURES: When paired with your iPhone, you can make calls and send texts from your wrist, navigate with Maps, buy items with Apple Pay, and use your voice to activate Siri. Made to last in almost any kind of weather, the Apple Watch SE is water-resistant up to 164'.

WORKOUTS THAT DON'T QUIT: Cycling, yoga, swimming, high-intensity interval training...the list goes on. You name it, Apple Watch measures it. Set workout-specific goals, see full summaries when you're done, and track how you're trending over time in the Activity app on your iPhone.

GET LOST IN YOUR MUSIC: With Apple Music on your wrist, you've got 60 million tracks of musical motivation to take you places. You can also catch up on the latest podcasts or listen to an audiobook if that's your thing. Stream everything you need right from your watch, even without your phone.

reviews.title: Superb smart watch! Excellent value! 🙌🏻💰
reviews.text:
This is an excellent watch especially for those who are very concerned about their overall health. I have a lot of health challenges and so it's important for me to be monitoring certain aspects like blood pressure, heart rate, and oxygen saturation. I'm typically someone who has high blood pressure have a pre-existing condition. This determines whether I can donate plasma, if I'm consuming too many calorie rich foods or if I should be concerned for my heart rate.

I love how this watch is very mindful of how long you've been sitting because I'm guilty of spending hours on the couch. Despite my poor health, it still essential to get up every once in a while and move around to get the blood flowing. This watch has excellent battery life I've only had to charge it one time since I've had it and I've had it now for over a month! Even being connected to Bluetooth on your phone it does not drain the battery quickly which is awesome! Pairing was super easy, just download the app pair it and set it and forget it. The watch and my phone always per immediately I've never had to fuss around with anything just great! I would highly recommend this watch to anyone. Certainly keeps me active and gives me all the important information I need to know on a daily basis 🙌🏻👍🏻🫁🏆

reviews.title: Really neat little smartwatch.
reviews.text: If you’re looking for a smartwatch that won’t break the bank but still provide handy applications at your literal fingertips, then this is a great buy! Works with iPhone or Android and it’s super easy to set up. The battery life so far is pretty good but I also haven’t had it for too long so will update if anything goes haywire. So far it’s exactly as described by the seller and it arrived quickly and packaged nicely. Great for self-use or a gift.

reviews.title: Not a Good Choice for Me
reviews.text:
Like - was able to call and receive texts. Was able to answer a call on the watch. Pairing was easy. The app was easy.
Dislike - Once paired, the watch takes all your media volume away from your phone. You won't hear any music like from YouTube, text message alert or phone ringing. The watch has a little vibration that you can barely feel, when you receive a text or getting a phone call. All sounds like from Facebook videos or anything, goes through the watch. The only way I could find to get it to quit doing this, was to unpair the watch totally. I need military time but couldn't find a way to make the time in a 24 hour format. You have to put the watch together. The bands come apart from the watch. Everytime you move your hand the watch face lights up. This was definitely not what I was looking for at all. Would I buy this again? No.

reviews.title: Just ok
reviews.text: The band fits as expected. I like the magnetic design and the magnet holds well. My problem with it is it gets caught on fabric and has pulled on some of my clothes. It also pinches sometimes.

title: Apple Watch SE (2nd Gen) (GPS, 40mm) - Starlight Aluminum Case with Starlight Sport Band, S/M (Renewed)
description: Amazon Renewed is your trusted destination for a huge selection of smartphones, computers, video games, power tools, and even more products that work and look like new and are backed by the Amazon Renewed Guarantee.
features: WHY APPLE WATCH SE — All the essentials to help you monitor your fitness, keep connected, track your health, and stay safe. Now up to 20 percent faster, with features like Crash Detection and enhanced workout metrics, it’s a better value than ever.
EASILY CUSTOMIZABLE — Available in a range of sizes and colors, with dozens of bands to choose from and watch faces with complications tailored to whatever you’re into.

HEALTH AND SAFETY FEATURES — Get help when you need it with Crash Detection, Fall Detection, and Emergency SOS. Get deep insights into your health, including notifications if you have an irregular rhythm or an unusually high or low heart rate.

SIMPLY COMPATIBLE — It works seamlessly with your Apple devices and services. Unlock your Mac automatically. Find your devices with a tap. Pay and send money with Apple Pay. Apple Watch requires an iPhone 8 or later with the latest iOS version.
SWIMPROOF AND STYLISH — Water resistant to 50 meters. Three finishes. And a redesigned, color-matched back case made with a new production process that reduces its carbon emissions over 80 percent.
APPS ON YOUR WRIST — With access to tens of thousands of apps on the App Store right on your wrist, Apple Watch is the perfect personal device for whatever you love to do.

A POWERFUL FITNESS PARTNER — The enhanced Workout app gives you new ways to train and advanced metrics for more information about your workout performance. And Apple Watch comes with three months of Apple Fitness+ free.
STAY CONNECTED — Send a text, make a call, listen to music and podcasts, use Siri, or call for help with Emergency SOS. Apple Watch SE (GPS) works with your iPhone or Wi-Fi to keep you connected.

APPLECARE — Every Apple Watch comes with one year of hardware repair coverage through its limited warranty and up to 90 days of complimentary technical support. Get AppleCare+ to extend your coverage and reduce the stress and cost of unexpected repairs.
LEGAL DISCLAIMERS — This is a summary of the main product features. See below to learn more.

reviews.title: My daughter is obsessed with the watch
reviews.text: This is a perfect alternative of a smart watch. I didn't want to get a real smart watch for my daughter because they are so expensive but she kept insisting on it. Saw this kids watch the other day and bought. She thinks it's an apple watch Haha. She loved it and I'm so happy.

reviews.title: She Loves It!
reviews.text: Picture and video is clear and the games and other things on it are fun. This will also help children to learn time and definitely a good beginners watch for a kid. She figured out how to use many of the features without my help. Lots of great features. She likes to set her alarm clock every morning. This is a great first watch and a perfect gift.

reviews.title: It was ok.
reviews.text:
It's very cute. But let's talk about it.
The Camara was a bit blurry.
Never tried the music option so I don't know.
The pedometer would mark a step even when just moving hands so that wasn't accurate.
We had some trouble setting the alarm clock and set chores.
And the games were cute and fun but killed the battery fast.
I guess I was hopping too much out of this.
It was a gift for my daughter since her timex watch went out. But unfortunately it doesn't have a connect to phone feature where she could receive messages when I'm out and about running errands or late to pick her up from school for that matter. The battery didn't last long and even though my girl liked it, it wasn't too functional for what we needed it for. As I was going to return it my dog had other plans. So yeah the watch didn't survived it's attacker. So it's not dog proofed. Lol 😂
